message.abstract:
<jats:title>Abstract</jats:title>
                <jats:p>A fast-spreading SARS-CoV-2 variant identified in the United Kingdom in December 2020 has raised international alarm. We estimate that, in all 15 countries analyzed, there is at least a 50% chance the variant was imported by travelers from the United Kingdom by December 7th.</jats:p>
title: International risk of the new variant COVID-19 importations originating in the United Kingdom
